title: Amtech V1020 3 Piece 115mm stone cutting disc set
features: HEAVY DUTY: These stone cutting discs are suitable for cutting brick, block and stone
SPECIFICATIONS: They are designed for use with 115mm (4.5") angle grinders with a maximum 13,300 RPM
GARDEN ESSENTIAL: A must-have for all types of garden maintenance
LOCKING MECHANISM: Safety lock ensures secure storage after use
SMOOTH ACTION: Spring-loaded for easy repeated cutting
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details.
